nodes.name: Replay Entry
nodes.notes: Contract B replay entry. Replays the original renewal run with the same correlation_id.

parameters.jsCode:
const p = $('Normalize Run').first().json;
return [{ json: { key: p.idem_key, tenant_id: p.tenant_id, workflow: '10-renewal-expansion' } }];

const p = $('Normalize Run').first().json;
return [{ json: { tenant_id: p.tenant_id, correlation_id: p.correlation_id, service: 'renewal', step: 'build-package', status: 'skipped', payload: { reason: 'duplicate run', key: p.idem_key } } }];

const p = $('Normalize Run').first().json;
return [{ json: { tenant_id: p.tenant_id, correlation_id: p.correlation_id, service: 'renewal', step: 'build-package', status: 'started', payload: { source: p.replay ? 'replay' : 'scheduled-or-webhook', window_days: p.window_days, force: p.force, execution_id: p.execution_id } } }];

const n = $('Notify Telegram').first().json;
return [{ json: { tenant_id: n.tenant_id, correlation_id: n.correlation_id, service: 'renewal', step: 'schedule-outreach', status: 'success', payload: { package_count: n.package_count, packages: n.packages, telegram_delivered: n.alert_delivered, notice: n.notice } } }];
